titleStmt.title: SII 30.106: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 106. (A.R. No. 183 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēsa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall of the same prakara Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 16: 1028 A.D.

summary.p: It registers an agreement made between the officials and the priests (Vaikhānasa) of the temple of Tirumukkūḍalāḻvār of Uttamasōḻa nilamai, a northern hamlet of Śri Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, an autonomous village (taniyūr) in Kaḷattūrkkoṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam about the use of surplus paddy of 120 kalam from their land which was allotted to them. Arrangements were made to appoint two persons to recite the sacred songs and to pay 120 kalam of paddy as remuneration and four kaḻañju of gold for cloths. It is stated that this arrangement was made of the order of Uvarkuḍi kiḻār, an official.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyaṟpāvaiyum cirttaṉic celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyaruḻiyu ḷiṭai tuṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvana vāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matil koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalīḻattaraicartamuṭiyum Āṅkarteviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaiytta cuntaramuṭiyum Intira nāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻantīvum ceruviṟ ciṉaviṟ Irupattoru kālaraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ poṟ ṟiruttukuRead- tiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta ceya
ciṅkaṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭamu mutirpaṭa vallai maturai maṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷaiya nāma(ṇ)ṇaik koṇaiyum veñcamavīrap pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamu mayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉ ṟolkulattintiratattaṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palatanattoṭu niṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalaināṭun tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻintu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇaikīrttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovintacantan māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamun toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkoṭaṭaṉ mahipālaṉai peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nittira neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum
Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttit caṅkirāma vicaiyattuṅka panmanākiya kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamu Ārttavanak(ā)nakarp porttoḻil vācililRead- vācalilviccātira toraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉaimaṇip putavamuṅ kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟai[jī]rvicaivamunaRead- niṟaicīr vicaiyamum tuṟainirppaṉṉaiyum naṉmalaiyūraiyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkāco pamum kāppuṟu niṟaipunal māppāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevalipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkorpukaḻt talaittakkolamun tītamarvalviṉai mātamāliṅkamum kalāmutik kaṭuntiṟalilāmuri tecamum tenakkavār ṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecarivanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentiracoḻa devaṟkku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu puravuvarittiṇaikka
ḷattārkkum varippottakamuṭaiyārkaḷukkum jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu �ttaniyūr śrī maturāntakac caturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai Uttamacoḻa nilaimait tirumuk kūṭalāḻvār vaikhānasaṉ kāciyapa naraciṅkapaṭṭanum pāratvā(r)ci kumāracuvāmiyum pārkkava nīlapaṭṭanum pāratvāci kecuvanu muḷḷiṭṭa vaikānasarom Oṭṭik kaittiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ittevarkku nāṅkaḷ tiruccennaṭaikkum Arccaṉaikkum Anupavittu varukinṟa Ē(ḻu)ḻaraippaṅkālum vanta nirnilamum punceyyūmaRead- puṉceyyumtuṇi nilaṅkaḷālum kaṇṇan Eṭṭuppaṭiyāl Eṅkaḷopaātiyālun tiruccennaṭai Opātiyālum van=ta nilaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Ittevar kalveṭṭup paṭiyilum śāsanappaṭiyilum Uḷḷa Avaṟṟukkum nāṅkaḷ munpu ceytu varu vār śrīmadhurān=taka caturvvetimaṅkalattu naṭuviṟ cempiyanmādevip perumaṇṭapattu
Iruntu kaṇakkukkeṭṭu mun ceytuvarukinṟa niman=tappaṭi nellu Iraṇṭāyirattu nānūṟṟu Irupatteḻukalane tūṇippatakkin mel Ippaṅkukaḷilum llaikaḷilum tirutti viḷainilamā viḷai paṟṟeṟina nilattāl Ēṟṟam nellu nūṟṟirupatin kalamum Ittevarkku tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār munpu Ilāmaiyil tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār IruvarkupaRead- iruvarkkupperāl nicatam nellup patakkāka nāḷḷonṟinukku nellut tūṇi Āka nāḷ 3 100 6 10 tinukku nellu nūṟṟirupatin kalamum tiruppatiyam pāṭuvārkku muṭṭāmai nellaṭṭukavenṟum Ittevar paṇṭāratte puṭavai mutalukku Āṇṭār perāl per Irukaḻañcākap pon nāṟkaḻañcu Iṭukavenṟum yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu nāḷ 3 10 2 ṉāl Atiyāriyaḷ Uvaṟkuṭikiḻāreva Ivarevinapaṭiye nivantañ cantirātittaval ceyvatākavum Ipparicu ceyyomākil ceyvi poṉ Irupattaiṅkaḻañcu pon nivan=tappaṭuvatāka Oṭṭi nivan=tak kaittiṭṭu Iṭṭukkuṭuttom kāciyapa
naraciṅkapaṭṭanum pāratuvāci kumārasvāmiyum pārkkava nilapaṭṭanum pāratu(r)vāci kecuvanumuḷḷiṭṭa vaikānasarom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutineṉ Ittevar karaṇattān vaḷaikiḻān de(p)pan Araici(n)nen Ivai Enneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
